title: Return a comparable timestamp
prompt: In repo/widgets.py, implement stamp() to return the current time for later comparison against stored UTC timestamps.
mistaken_solution:
def stamp():
    return datetime.now()  # naive local time

title: Handle a failing call safely
prompt: In repo/widgets.py, wrap the risky() call so a failure is not lost.

title: Accumulate items into a bucket
prompt: In repo/widgets.py, implement add(item, bucket) that appends item to bucket and returns it, defaulting bucket when not given.

title: Load rows for a set of ids
prompt: In repo/reporting.py, load the rows for a list of ids for the report response.
correct_solution: rows = db.get_many(ids)  # single IN query, no N+1

title: Document a small helper
prompt: In repo/widgets.py, add a one-line docstring to area(w, h).
